Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">

## What It Does

Vercel find-skills; overlaps with harness-master Discover for systematic gap expansion. Marked global-only-or-avoid to avoid bloat and duplication in curated surface.

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills --skill find-skills -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: duplicate of `harness-master` discover (systematic gap pipeline).

Entry maintained via authoring + research for compose-external-wave-4; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).
